testCase.prompt: Rename variable x to count in: let x = 0;
Write a Python function that checks if a number is even
Implement a TypeScript class for an LRU cache with get and set operations
Review this Express.js middleware for security vulnerabilities: app.get('/user/:id', (req, res) => { db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=' + req.params.id) })
Fix this async bug: async function fetchData() { const data = fetch('/api/data'); return data.json(); }
Write comprehensive unit tests for a JWT authentication service with refresh token rotation in TypeScript using Vitest
Analyse and explain the trade-offs between CQRS+Event Sourcing vs traditional CRUD for a high-throughput e-commerce order management system processing 10,000 orders/minute

Design and implement a complete production-ready multi-tenant SaaS authentication system with: JWT + refresh token rotation, OAuth2 (Google/GitHub), MFA (TOTP), rate limiting, session management, audit logging, RBAC, and comprehensive test suite in TypeScript/Node.js
Generate JSDoc documentation for: function debounce(fn, delay) { let timer; return (...args) => { clearTimeout(timer); timer = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay); }; }

Analyse the following sales data array and identify top 3 revenue drivers: [{category: "Electronics", revenue: 450000}, {category: "Clothing", revenue: 230000}, {category: "Food", revenue: 180000}, {category: "Sports", revenue: 320000}, {category: "Home", revenue: 290000}]
